---
layout: cv
title: Baker Heggie's CV
---
# Baker Heggie
Operations Manager | DSP Performance Ops

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:heggiebaker@gmail.com">heggiebaker@gmail.com</a> | (442) 264-3245
</div>

## Currently

Senior at Brigham Young University - Idaho, studying Business Analytics, graduating Spring 2027

### Specialized in

Performance management, process improvement (Lean/Six Sigma), team mentoring & feedback, cross-functional collaboration, safety & quality compliance
<!-- -->
### Research interests

Data-driven decision making, process analytics, supply chain optimization, performance metrics & dashboards, operational risk mitigation

## Education

`Expected Spring 2027`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__

- Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics, GPA 3.7
- Relevant coursework: Data-Driven Decision Making, Process Analytics, Supply Chain Optimization, Performance Metrics & Dashboards, Lean Systems

## Certifications & Technical Skills

`Current`
OSHA 10-Hour General Industry Certified

Advanced: MS Excel (formulas, dashboards), SQL, Tableau

Familiar: CRM tools

## Occupation

`Feb 2024 - Present`
__Product Robot Lead__, Idahoan Foods - Lewisville, ID

- Managed safety, quality, productivity, and performance for an automated stacking line (2000 units/hour); conducted root-cause investigations on defects and implemented adjustments that reduced downtime
- Provided regular formal and informal feedback and performance reviews to 1-2 direct reports; mentored team on accountability tools and SOPs
- Built collaborative relationships with maintenance, quality, and machine operators
- Analyzed production data using MS Excel; self-identified process projects that optimized scheduling and mitigated risks
- Supported team motivation in a physically demanding environment; delivered workflow enhancements, ensuring corporate expectations were met on time

`2022 - 2024`
__Operations Associate (Team Lead)__, Retail / High-Volume Operations

- Led teams of 2-5 in daily operations and inventory management; drove performance accountability through coaching, reducing errors 20% via targeted feedback and quality measures

<!-- Last updated: July 2026 -->
